purpose: Add a top-rail ION Context Sync panel to the ChatOps browser carrier so Braden can select current project context packages and request one approved sync ZIP through the local bridge.

implemented_surfaces.browser_top_rail: Context Sync dropdown beside the existing ION onboarding/version control.
implemented_surfaces.project_selection: Multi-select discovered ION project context packages from governed package roots.
implemented_surfaces.artifact_output: One ZIP plus manifest and operation receipt under the ChatOps bridge export lane.
non_claims: The sync ZIP is context material only, not accepted ION state.
The browser extension selects paths but does not compile ZIPs directly.
Importing or uploading the ZIP does not grant mutation, production, live execution, or secrets authority.

activation_required: Restart the local ChatOps bridge daemon so the new /exports/project-context-sync-zip route is served.
Reload the unpacked browser extension so Chrome uses the updated dist files.
